unit.note: 17 adopt intake (test_brief_intake_adopt.py, incl. in-process main() + loader poison-free/fail-closed) + 6 banner parity (test_banner_plain_language_parity.py); 37 moved shared brief_intake tests also green

integration.note: adopt/run/iterate SKILLs are prompts; the deterministic seams are the brief-intake helper (shared) + adopt_brief_intake adapter (unit + CLI tested) and the banner copy-parity test

behaviors.behavior: AC1: adopt full brief with a description -> product_description pre-filled and brief_prefilled==['product_description'] (that Step-C question removed)
AC1: profile + scope stay scan-gated even with a full brief (detection over questions -- a brief never pre-answers them)
AC1: run + iterate banners surface plain-language glosses that EQUAL the shared index (docs/guide.md Appendix A) verbatim
AC1/AC2: a brief yields FEWER questions than no-brief (adopt intake removes exactly the product-description prompt, nothing more)
AC2: the banner copy-parity test is drift-detecting -- a term surfaced on BOTH banners (ADR) must be identical, and any un-mirrored edit FAILS
behaviors.evidence: test_shared_terms_identical_across_surfaces PASSED; RED-verified: corrupting the iterate ADR gloss produced 2 failures, then reverted

behaviors.behavior: AC3 (regression): no brief -> has_brief False, brief_prefilled empty, profile/scope scan-gated -> adopt Step C unchanged
AC3 (regression): run + iterate + adopt behave as today without a brief -- full suites green
behaviors.evidence: shipwright-run 334, shipwright-adopt 373, shipwright-iterate 476, shared 3836 PASSED (1 pre-existing unrelated campaign-backfill fail)

behaviors.behavior: Partial brief: coded answers but no description -> nothing pre-filled (product-description prompt still fires); blank/whitespace description not pre-filled
io-boundary round-trip: brief JSON producer -> file -> adopt intake consumer -> product_description recovered
io-boundary human/Windows-edited: utf-8-sig BOM + CRLF + non-ASCII (umlaut/emoji) brief parses to the right product_description
behaviors.evidence: boundary probes (BOM json, CRLF md, non-ASCII json) all PASS -- asymptote reached (2 clean batches, 0 findings)

behaviors.behavior: Robustness: malformed inline JSON falls back to free text (no crash); a non-dict JSON FILE degrades to brief-present-but-nothing-prefilled (no mis-prefill)
Security: an explicit-but-missing brief file degrades to no-brief (never a half-read/path-string description); --brief is data, disallowed-suffix path never slurped
ADR-045-safe reuse: adopt_brief_intake loads shared brief_intake via spec_from_file_location (no cross-plugin lib-namespace shadow); CLI emits the adopt intake JSON (in-process main() + subprocess)
behaviors.evidence: test_cli_emits_adopt_intake_json + test_main_with_brief_prints_json + test_main_no_brief_prints_legacy PASSED + full cross-plugin adopt suite green (no lib shadow)

behaviors.behavior: Loader hardening (PR-review fix): a raising exec_module leaves NO poisoned sentinel in sys.modules (register-after-exec), and a None spec fails closed with ImportError; a fresh load still works after a failure

AC4: footprint bounded -- run/SKILL.md net-zero at 400, iterate 299, adopt 300 (all pass their <=300/<=400 gates); helpers/tests <300; bloat baseline not ratcheted; adopt_brief_intake changed-line diff-coverage 97.5% (>=80 gate)
behaviors.evidence: adopt+iterate test_kern_skill_md_under_300_loc PASSED; wc: run 400 / iterate 299 / adopt 300 / helper 120 / test 245; diff-cover@10.3.0 vs origin/main = 97.5% PASS
